lines.speaker: Arvel
lines.text: Good day traveller. You are far from home, what brings you here?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I am a wandering hero, I come here in search of adventure.

lines.speaker: Arvel
lines.text: Sounds ghastly, I just want to live in peace.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Unfortunately without people like me, peace doesn't last for long.

lines.speaker: Arvel
lines.text: True, but then again most adventurers cause as much trouble as they put right.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You've got a point there... Hmm...

lines.speaker: Arvel
lines.text: Well, good day traveller. And always do the right thing.

sections.title: During Song of the Elves, after the attack on Lletya

lines.speaker: Arvel
lines.text: Well we're still alive, after all that's happened, we should be thankful of that.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hopefully this war is over soon.

lines.speaker: Arvel
lines.text: Indeed, but how many more need to die before that happens?

lines.speaker: Arvel
lines.text: What do you think you're doing?
